calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick for and with Jeffrey Rigler.

Mr. Roddick stated that Ms. Simi and Ms. Benenato referred to each other (the Decedent) as cousins but that neither one of them could ascertain if it was by lineage and that they believe it may have been by marriage. Mr. Roddick also stated that Mr. Rigler is not in a position to determine if there are any intestate Heirs. Mr. Rigler stated that he never heard Mr. Fulton refer to any relatives. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Apr-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Continued To Apr-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick for and with Jeffrey Rigler.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to February 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide further briefing on the issue of whether Probate Code 21350 or Probate Code 21380 applies.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To Dec-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
